fileOperations.contentDisplayed: The file content is displayed in the diff view above

interactive.title: Interactive Prompt
interactive.waiting: Waiting for your response in the CLI
interactive.instruction: Please select an option in your terminal where Claude is running.
interactive.instructionDetail: In the CLI, you would select this option interactively using arrow keys or by typing the number.

permissions.retry: Permission saved. Retry the request to use the tool.
permissions.error: Unable to update permissions. Please try again.

todo.updated: Todo list has been updated successfully

usageLimit.resetAt: Claude usage limit reached. Your limit will reset at **{{time}} {{timezone}}** - {{date}}

descriptions.default: Only trusted commands (ls, cat, grep, git status, etc.) run automatically. Other commands are skipped. Can write to workspace.
descriptions.acceptEdits: All commands run automatically within the workspace. Full auto mode with sandboxed execution.
descriptions.bypassPermissions: Full system access with no restrictions. All commands run automatically with full disk and network access. Use with caution.
descriptions.plan: Planning mode - no commands are executed

input.placeholder: Type / for commands, @ for files, or ask {{provider}} anything...
input.attachmentOnlyFallback: Please inspect the attached files and help me with them.

hintText.ctrlEnter: Ctrl+Enter to send • Shift+Enter for new line • Tab to change modes • / for slash commands
hintText.enter: Enter to send • Shift+Enter for new line • Tab to change modes • / for slash commands

input.clickToChangeMode: Click to change permission mode (or press Tab in input)

selector.title: Thinking Mode
selector.description: Extended thinking gives Claude more time to evaluate alternatives
selector.tip: Higher thinking modes take more time but provide more thorough analysis

providerSelection.title: Choose Your AI Assistant
providerSelection.description: Select a provider to start a new conversation
providerSelection.unavailableHint: Some CLI backends are unavailable on this machine. Install the missing tools in Settings before using them.

readyPrompt.claude: Ready to use Claude with {{model}}. Start typing your message below.
readyPrompt.cursor: Ready to use Cursor with {{model}}. Start typing your message below.
readyPrompt.gemini: Ready to use Gemini with {{model}}. Start typing your message below.
readyPrompt.codex: Ready to use Codex with {{model}}. Start typing your message below.
readyPrompt.default: Select a provider above to begin

mode.title: Choose Session Type
mode.subtitle: Decide whether this session should drive research planning or stay focused on workspace questions.
mode.researchDescription: Use the project research workflow, onboarding prompts, and pipeline guidance.
mode.workspaceQaDescription: Ask about files, modules, and implementation details without triggering the research workflow.
mode.workspaceQaHint: This session stays focused on repository questions unless you explicitly ask to start research planning.

continue.title: Continue your conversation
continue.description: Ask questions about your code, request changes, or get help with development tasks

messages.perfWarning: All messages loaded — scrolling may be slower. Click "Scroll to bottom" to restore performance.

selectProject.title: Select a Project
selectProject.description: Choose a project to open an interactive shell in that directory

historyEdit.promptDescription: Web Chat does not rewrite message history directly. To use the model's native edit, rewind, or retry flow, continue in Shell.
historyEdit.bannerTitle: This session is now open in Shell
historyEdit.bannerDescription: Use the model's native history edit, rewind, or retry flow here. Web Chat only displays the conversation and does not rewrite history directly.

projectSelection.startChatWithProvider: Select a project to start chatting with {{provider}}

compact.noTasks: No tasks yet. Start by chatting with the Agent.
compact.emptyHint: Talk to the Agent to generate and configure a research pipeline.

skillShortcuts.title: Skill Shortcuts
skillShortcuts.promptSingle:
Please use the {{skill}} skill to help me with this task.

Describe your task here:
skillShortcuts.promptMulti:
Please use the following skills for this task: {{skills}}.

Describe your research task here:

guidedStarter.title: What should we do next?
guidedStarter.description: Choose a direction to fill the prompt quickly.
guidedStarter.noAvailableSkills: No matched installed skills for this option yet.
guidedStarter.noAvailableSkillsFallback: No installed match found, showing the default recommended skills for this option.

template.intro: Please help me with "{{scenario}}" and use these skills when needed: {{skills}}.
template.output: Please provide a step-by-step plan and start with the first actionable task.

startFullProject.title: Start a project
startFullProject.description: Set up the full research project, define the pipeline, and turn the idea into an actionable plan.

paperReproduction.title: Reproduce a paper
paperReproduction.description: Read the paper, identify key implementation details, and build a reproducibility plan.

literatureSurvey.title: Literature survey
literatureSurvey.description: Collect recent papers, summarize trends, and map open research gaps.

researchIdea.title: Refine an idea
researchIdea.description: Turn a rough direction into clear hypotheses, novelty, and evaluation criteria.

experimentPlan.title: Plan an experiment
experimentPlan.description: Design baselines, metrics, ablations, and risk controls before implementation.

paperWriting.title: Draft a paper
paperWriting.description: Structure sections, sharpen claims, and align writing with target venue expectations.

manuscriptReview.title: Review a draft
manuscriptReview.description: Run a reviewer-style check for methods, evidence, references, and writing quality.

rebuttalResponse.title: Write a rebuttal
rebuttalResponse.description: Respond to reviewer comments with venue-aware strategies, safety gates, and issue tracking.

grantProposal.title: Grant proposal
grantProposal.description: Plan, draft, revise, or resubmit a faculty funding proposal for NSF, NIH, DOE, DARPA, NASA, or NSFC.

presentationPromotion.title: Presentation materials
presentationPromotion.description: Turn the paper into slides, narration scripts, TTS audio, and a demo video.

noBrief.title: Set Up Your Research Pipeline
noBrief.description: Describe your research idea below and the agent will interactively build your pipeline, generating a research brief and task list.
noBrief.step1: Your research topic and high-level goal
noBrief.step2: Scope, boundaries, and target venue (if any)

noTasks.title: Generate Tasks from Your Brief
noTasks.description: A research brief exists but no tasks have been generated yet. Let the agent read your brief and create a task list.
